name: Paracesis

components.name: Galatine
components.description: With massive charged power and the ability to hit up to five foes in a single swing, the Galatine sword is the heavy artillery of Melee Weapons.

patchlogs.name: Echoes of the Zariman: Update 31.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Wukong’s Celestial Twin having the original player loadout instead of just the Paracesis in the final stages of The New War quest.

patchlogs.name: Nora's Mix Volume 1: Update 31.2.0 + 31.2.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a crash in The New War quest if you don’t own a Paracesis.

patchlogs.name: Rising Tide: Hotfix 26.1.3
patchlogs.changes: Added Lifted status to the Paracesis on a Heavy Ground Slam attack.

patchlogs.name: The Old Blood: Hotfix 26.0.7
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Polarize screen not displaying the correct max rank of weapons that go over 30 (Paracesis, Kuva weapons, etc).
Fixed weapons above Rank 30 (Paracesis, etc) not maintaining their Rank if a Host migration occurs. This also fixes some Mods being ignored due to Mod capacity being in excess of the standard 30 Ranks.

patchlogs.name: Chimera: Hotfix 23.10.4
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed the Paracesis having incorrect Mod capacity at Rank 30, which resulted in certain Mods not functioning correctly. This also fixes not being prompted that an equipped Mod that you are Ranking up via Endo exceeds the max Mod capacity and to uninstall. 
Fixed ability to Forma the Paracesis for the second time when it is not at its ‘max Rank’.
